attributes.description: Alerts when session utilisation exceeds 85%. Session exhaustion prevents new connections.
attributes.name: [Oracle OTel] Session utilisation high

investigation_guide.blob:
## Oracle session utilisation high

### What fired
Peak session count exceeded 85% of the session limit.

### Why it matters
Oracle `sessions` bounds total concurrent user and system sessions. Exhaustion causes connection errors for applications.

### Triage
1. Check application pool sizing.

### Remediation
- Raise `sessions` init parameter.
- Tune pooling.

### Tuning
- 85% threshold.
